data.description: 10-year Indian government bond yield falls after Reserve Bank of India reduces rates.

data.title: TransThera published tinengotinib study results for Cholangiocarcinoma on Lancet. Important numbers: Phase 2 trial, Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, TransThera Sciences Inc. disclosed the release of clinical findings from a Phase 2 trial conducted in the United States regarding tinengotinib for Cholangiocarcinoma patients. The results were published in The Lancet Gastroenterology. The study focused on the efficacy of tinengotinib in treating CCA. The company is based in Nanjing, China, while the trial took place in Gaithersburg, Maryland. This announcement highlights significant progress in research and development within the medical field, showcasing promising implications for patients suffering from this type of cancer.

Standing Deposit Facility rate set at 5%, according to RBI Governor.

data.title: ANTA, a leading sportswear company founded in 1991, showcased new tech lineup at The Running Event with Kenenisa Bekele.
data.description: Established in 1991, ANTA Sports Products Limited has developed a strong collection of brands over the last 30 years. Currently, it ranks within the top three sportswear companies globally. With a mission to "bring the transcendent sports experience to the masses," the company has made significant progress in achieving its goal.

data.title: Dogecoin falls 2%, trading volume down 23%, futures open interest drops 3.53%. Analyst predicts 26% surge. Bitcoin and Ethereum also down slightly.
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) saw a 2% decline in value over the past 24 hours, erasing some recent gains, as per a notable analyst pointing to a key technical indicator that could potentially lead to a 26% increase. Trading volume for the memecoin dropped by 23%, indicating reduced trader interest. Speculative interest waned as DOGE spot price fell, resulting in a 3.53% decrease in DOGE futures open interest within the same period, according to data from Coinglass. This downturn mirrored a broader market correction, with major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) also experiencing declines of 1.37% and 1.16% respectively in the past day.
30-year JGB yield edges lower to 3.360%, down 3 basis points.
